Story: As a Guest, I want to create an account so I can access platform features.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Validate email/phone uniqueness.
AC2: Password must be hashed.
AC3: Default role assignment based on registration type (Customer/Owner).
Quality Constraint (NFR): Password must be at least 8 characters.

Story: As a User, I want to log in securely using credentials to receive a JWT token.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Verify credentials against DB.
AC2: Issue Access and Refresh tokens.
AC3: Return user profile summary.

Story: As an Owner, I want to list my property with details and images.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Validate required fields (title, price, area).
AC2: Upload images to Cloudinary.
AC3: Set initial status to PENDING_APPROVAL.

Story: As a Customer, I want to search for properties by location, price, and type.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Full-text search on titles/descriptions.
AC2: Range filters for price and area.
AC3: Sort by newest/cheapest.

Story: As a User, I want to see full details and media of a specific property.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Fetch details from PostgreSQL.
AC2: Display interactive map location.
AC3: Show contact info of the owner.

Story: As a Customer, I want to book a viewing session for a property.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Select available date/time slots.
AC2: Prevent double booking.
AC3: Status set to PENDING.

Story: As an Owner/Agent, I want to manage viewing requests.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Update status to CONFIRMED or CANCELLED.
AC2: Trigger notification to Customer.

Story: As an Agent, I want to generate a rental contract draft from a template.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Auto-fill property and party details.
AC2: Define lease duration and monthly rent.
AC3: Upload PDF to Cloudinary.

Story: As a Customer, I want to sign a deposit contract to reserve a property.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Transition status to WAITING_OFFICIAL.
AC2: Lock property status to prevents other appointments.

Story: As a User, I want to pay for contracts or services using PayOS/Payway.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Generate payment link from provider.
AC2: Record transaction as PENDING.
AC3: Redirect user to gateway.

Story: As a System, I want to receive payment confirmations from external gateways.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Verify webhook signature.
AC2: Update Transaction and Contract status to PAID/ACTIVE.
AC3: Idempotent processing.

Story: As a User, I want to report suspicious listings or behavior.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Capture reason and description.
AC2: Link to specific property or user profile.

Story: As an Admin, I want to review reports and take disciplinary actions.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Ban users or delete listings.
AC2: Resolve report status.

Story: As a User, I want to receive real-time alerts for updates (appointments, payments).
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Integrate with Firebase (FCM).
AC2: Send data payloads to mobile/web clients.

Story: As a User, I want to receive important documents and receipts via email.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Send PDF contracts as attachments.
AC2: HTML template rendering.

Story: As an Admin, I want to see monthly revenue and transaction statistics.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Aggregate data from MongoDB/Postgres.
AC2: Export to CSV/Excel.

Story: As a User, I want to manage my personal information and avatar.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Update name, phone, bio.
AC2: Upload avatar to Cloudinary.

Story: As an Owner, I want to pay to rank my property higher in search results.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Purchase 'Ranking' points.
AC2: Apply ranking logic in search query.

Story: As an Owner, I want to de-list my property once sold or rented.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Soft delete from active search.
AC2: Maintain history for analytics.

Story: As an Admin, I want to assign a Sales Agent to manage an Owner's property.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Track assignment history.
AC2: Grant Agent permissions to edit listing.

Story: As a User, I want to select locations from a standardized hierarchical list.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Return list of Provinces.
AC2: Filter Districts by Province.

Story: As a Customer, I want to save properties to my favorites for later review.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Toggle favorite status.
AC2: List all saved properties.

Story: As a User, I want to stay logged in without re-entering credentials.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Use Refresh Token to get new Access Token.
AC2: Rotate refresh tokens.

Story: As a Customer, I want to chat in real-time with an Agent about a property.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Socket.io connection establishment.
AC2: Message persistence in MongoDB.
AC3: Read receipts.

Story: As an Owner, I want to see an estimated market value for my property based on historical data.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: ML model integration.
AC2: Prediction based on area, location, and features.

Story: As a Customer, I want to view a property's layout in 3D AR using my smartphone.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Render 3D model overlay.
AC2: Interactive hotspots for room details.

Story: As a User, I want to search for properties by drawing a custom area on a map.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Geospatial query integration.
AC2: Interactive cluster map markers.

Story: As a Buyer, I want my funds to be held in escrow until the property title is verified.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Multi-stage payment hold.
AC2: Release funds upon Admin/Legal approval.

Story: As a User, I want to invite friends using a referral link to earn platform rewards.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Generate unique referral codes.
AC2: Track successful signups.
AC3: Credit rewards/points to account.

Story: As a Customer, I want to rate and review Sales Agents after a transaction.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Submit 1-5 star rating.
AC2: Write text review.
AC3: Average rating displayed on Agent profile.

Story: As an Owner, I want to see how many people viewed or favorited my listings.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Real-time view count tracking.
AC2: Weekly summary of interest.
AC3: Conversion rate from view to appointment.

Story: As a User, I want my identity and land documents to be scanned automatically for faster verification.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Integrate OCR (e.g., Google Vision).
AC2: Auto-fill registration forms from scan.
AC3: Flag blurred or invalid images.

Story: As a Sales Agent, I want to subscribe to premium tiers to list more properties.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Tier-based listing limits.
AC2: Recurring billing integration (Stripe/PayOS).
AC3: Priority support badge.

Story: As a Global User, I want to switch between Vietnamese and English languages.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: i18n framework implementation.
AC2: Dynamic content translation (API-driven).
AC3: Locale-aware date/currency formatting.

Story: As an Admin, I want to see a detailed audit trail of all sensitive system actions.
Acceptance Criteria - AC:
AC1: Log login/logout events.
AC2: Track all data deletions and status changes.
AC3: Searchable log history with IP/User info.
